factset.label: FactSet
factset.description: Live market data — equities, bonds, FX rates, risk factors, portfolio analytics
factset.purpose: Powers /vkkm:stress-test and /vkkm:risk-register with live portfolio data. When connected, outputs are labeled DATA-GROUNDED instead of ILLUSTRATIVE ESTIMATE.
factset.status: optional — plugin runs in Illustrative Estimate mode without this connector

msci.label: MSCI
msci.description: Index data, ESG risk factors, factor risk models
msci.purpose: Powers ESG risk scoring and factor exposure analysis in /vkkm:risk-register and /vkkm:stress-test.

google_drive.label: Google Drive
google_drive.description: Batch document scanning — upload contracts and agreements directly from Google Drive
google_drive.purpose: Powers /vkkm:scan-document for batch contract analysis without manual copy-paste.

docusign.label: DocuSign
docusign.description: Contract ingestion — pull live contracts from DocuSign envelopes for risk scanning
docusign.purpose: Powers /vkkm:scan-document for direct contract ingestion from DocuSign workflows.

sharepoint.label: SharePoint
sharepoint.description: Enterprise document access — scan contracts and risk documents stored in SharePoint
sharepoint.purpose: Powers /vkkm:scan-document and /vkkm:risk-register for enterprise document workflows.

data_labeling_rules.no_connector_active: 📊 ILLUSTRATIVE ESTIMATE — Based on standard market assumptions, not live data.
data_labeling_rules.connector_active: 📊 DATA-GROUNDED — Based on live data from {connector_name}.

note: All connectors are optional. VKKM Aegis operates in Illustrative Estimate mode when no live data connector is active. Connect FactSet or MSCI for production-grade financial analysis.
